name: borrower-spousal-joint
anchor: Borrower-count axis: spousal joint (under-tested area per Phase 1)
rationale: Married couple co-applying on refinance: Marcus Anthony Webb + Patricia Webb (spouse). loan_application doc shows both names with combined income. F1 canonical-map borrower-aggregation: does borrower_name canonical field hold 'Marcus Anthony Webb and Patricia Webb' as single string, or are there per-applicant fields? Tests joint-applicant handling for under-tested area. Existing canonical fields likely accommodate via string concatenation; may surface aggregation gaps in Phase 5.
notes: Single-event sequence. Fixture uses concatenated names in borrower_name field; Vienna's response will reveal whether canonical_map gracefully handles spousal joint or needs explicit aggregation field.
